paragraphs: The stock price of Fermi Inc. is currently 6.12, representing a 1.16 percent increase from the prior close. Over a window of 20 sessions, the price change is -31.77 percent. There has been one new news item in the last 24 hours.

Recent news includes an announcement from Fermi Inc. that the company will host its second quarter 2026 earnings call on August 13, 2026, as reported by FinanzNachrichten.de. This news was released on July 20, 2026.

There have been various SEC filings from Fermi Inc., including a Schedule 13G filing on July 20, 2026, and multiple 8-K filings, one of which disclosed the issuance of $431.25 million in aggregate principal amount of 5.00% convertible senior notes due 2031. Another 8-K filing reported the resignation of director Miles Everson, effective July 10, 2026. There has been one Form 4 filing in the feed.
